title: ISO 19115-2 to STAC Mapping Extension
description: Defines the mapping from ISO 19115-2 metadata to STAC and adds iso:* fields for ISO concepts that have no equivalent in any existing STAC extension.

fields.$comment: All iso:* fields are optional at the schema level. Required-ness is set by the profile (see README), not by the schema.

iso:lineage_statement.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_DataIdentification.resourceLineage.LI_Lineage.statement. A human-readable statement describing the data's lineage.

iso:maintenance_and_update_frequency.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_MaintenanceInformation.maintenanceAndUpdateFrequency. MD_MaintenanceFrequencyCode codelist value (e.g. continual, daily, weekly, fortnightly, monthly, quarterly, biannually, annually, asNeeded, irregular, notPlanned, unknown, periodic, semimonthly, biennially).

iso:presentation_form.description: ISO 19115-1 CI_Citation.presentationForm. CI_PresentationFormCode codelist value (e.g. mapDigital, documentDigital, imageDigital, profileDigital, modelDigital, tableDigital, videoDigital).

iso:character_set_code.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_DataIdentification.characterSet. MD_CharacterSetCode codelist value (e.g. utf8, ucs2, ucs4, 8859part1, ebcdic, ascii).

iso:spatial_representation_type.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_DataIdentification.spatialRepresentationType. MD_SpatialRepresentationTypeCode codelist value: vector, grid, textTable, tin, stereoModel, video.

iso:purpose.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_DataIdentification.purpose. Free-text summary of the intended purpose of the resource.

iso:status.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_DataIdentification.status. MD_ProgressCode codelist value (e.g. completed, historicalArchive, obsolete, onGoing, planned, required, underDevelopment, final, pending, retired, superseded, tentative, valid, accepted, notAccepted, withdrawn, proposed, deprecated).

iso:access_constraints.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_LegalConstraints.accessConstraints. MD_RestrictionCode codelist value (e.g. copyright, patent, patentPending, trademark, license, intellectualPropertyRights, restricted, otherRestrictions, unrestricted, licenseUnrestricted, licenseEndUser, licenseDistributor, private, statutory, confidential, sensitiveButUnclassified, in-confidence).

iso:use_constraints.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_LegalConstraints.useConstraints. MD_RestrictionCode codelist value, same enumeration as iso:access_constraints.

iso:use_limitation.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_LegalConstraints.useLimitation. Free-text limitation on use applying to the resource.

iso:other_constraints.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_LegalConstraints.otherConstraints. Free-text other constraints applying to the resource.

iso:supplemental_information.description: ISO 19115-1 MD_DataIdentification.supplementalInformation. Free-text supplemental information about the resource that does not fit elsewhere. Source spreadsheet recommended appending to STAC `description`; carrying it as a typed iso:* field preserves the ISO/STAC round-trip.

^(?!iso:).$comment: Allow any non-iso:-prefixed key to pass through (this extension co-exists with others).
